config.name: cloudflare_general_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: cloudflare_general_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (4001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:23:58.149467

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local EMAIL_PATTERN = "^[%w%.%-]+@[%w%.%-]+%.%w+$"
local TIMESTAMP_PATTERN = "^%d+%.?%d*$"

-- Cached references for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_match = string.match
local string_format = string.format

-- Helper functions
local function validate_email(email)
    if not email or type(email) ~= "string" then return false end
    return string_match(email, EMAIL_PATTERN) ~= nil
end

local function parse_timestamp(ts)
    if not ts then return nil end
    if type(ts) == "number" then return ts end
    if type(ts) == "string" and string_match(ts, TIMESTAMP_PATTERN) then
        return tonumber(ts)
    end
    return nil
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with detailed error reporting
    if not record then
        return nil, "Record is nil"
    end
    if type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, string_format("Invalid record type: %s", type(record))
    end

    -- Initialize output with default values
    local output = {
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                vendor_name = "Cloudflare",
                name = "Enterprise Logs"
            }
        },
        class_uid = 4001,
        class_name = "Network Activity", 
        category_uid = 4,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        activity_id = 99, -- Default activity
        severity_id = 99, -- Default severity
        status_id = 1,    -- Default status
        time = parse_timestamp(record.CreatedAt) or os_time() * 1000,
        actor = {
            user = {}
        },
        src_endpoint = {},
        dst_endpoint = {}
    }

    -- Optimized field mappings using local references
    local actor = output.actor.user
    local src = output.src_endpoint
    local dst = output.dst_endpoint

    -- Email handling with validation
    if record.Email and validate_email(record.Email) then
        actor.email_addr = record.Email
        -- Extract username from email
        actor.name = string_match(record.Email, "([^@]+)@") or record.Email
    end

    -- IP address handling
    if record.IPAddress then
        src.ip = record.IPAddress
    end
    if record.SourceIP then
        src.ip = record.SourceIP
    end
    if record.DestinationIP then
        dst.ip = record.DestinationIP
    end

    -- Port handling with type conversion
    if record.SourcePort then
        src.port = tonumber(record.SourcePort)
    end
    if record.DestinationPort then
        dst.port = tonumber(record.DestinationPort)
    end

    -- Device information
    if record.DeviceID then
        src.uid = record.DeviceID
    end
    if record.DeviceName then
        src.name = record.DeviceName
    end

    -- Validation before return
    if not output.time then
        return nil, "Invalid timestamp"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper for production use
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
